name: twg
description: Token-efficient Atlassian context for Codex via TWG CLI.

interface.shortDescription: CLI for Jira, Confluence, and Atlassian context.
interface.longDescription: TWG CLI gives Codex token-efficient access to Jira, Confluence, Bitbucket, JSM, Assets, Atlas, Jira Align, Loom, Trello, Rovo, and connected third-party data sources. Use it to search work, map ownership, summarize status, triage reviews, and run handoffs. Install Atlassian Rovo MCP plugin for your usage outside of your desktop. Learn more: https://teamworkgraph.com/.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my work during the past month
Catch me up on a Jira issue, page, or project
